arts.ttl: Tottenham submit offer for highly-rated South American, talks could intensify in summer
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have submitted an offer to sign Facundo Buonanotte from Brighton and Hove Albion. The 19-year-old Argentine attacking midfielder is currently on loan at Leicester City and he has done quite well for the Foxes. According to Fichajes, Tottenham are watching him closely and they have submitted a €25 million offer to get the […] The post Tottenham submit offer for highly-rated South American, talks could intensify in summer appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Tottenham plotting bargain move for £100k-a-week England international
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are keen on signing the Everton striker Dominic Calvert-Lewin. The 27-year-old will be a free agent in the summer of 2025 and a report from Fichajes claims that Spurs are looking at him closely ahead of a potential move. He has been linked with Arsenal recently. The £100k-a-week England international will be a […] The post Tottenham plotting bargain move for £100k-a-week England international appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Why Dominic Solanke is not in the Tottenham squad to face Fulham in Premier League
arts.sum: Solanke, who signed for £65million in the summer from Bournemouth, missed two games earlier in the season with an ankle injury and did look to pick up a groin injury during Thursday night's Europa League game with Roma. The groin injury he appeared to pick up on Thursday did not have an impact, but it is in fact an illness which has seen the England striker miss out.

arts.ttl: Gary Neville explains why Man City's three-goal Feyenoord collapse was WORSE than embarrassing Tottenham defeat for Pep Guardiola's men
arts.sum: Gary Neville believes Man City's 3-3 draw with Feyenoord in midweek will have had a more damaging impact on the team than last weekend's 4-0 loss to Tottenham.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou explains Dominic Solanke absence from Tottenham squad against Fulham
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur head coach Ange Postecoglou reveals that Dominic Solanke is missing from Spurs' squad to face Fulham due to illness.

arts.ttl: Liverpool handed boost in their pursuit of 24-year-old Tottenham and Newcastle target
arts.sum: Liverpool are keen on signing Antoine Semenyo from Bournemouth. According to Football Insider, the 24-year-old has attracted interest from Tottenham and Newcastle as well. Liverpool are prepared to rival both clubs for his signature. Liverpool are hoping to add more depth to their attacking unit and the versatile Bournemouth forward would be ideal for them. arts.ttl: Tottenham transfer rumours: 24-year-old AFCON winner eyed as Guglielmo Vicario replacement?
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur reportedly add Angers goalkeeper Yahia Fofana to their list of possible replacements for the injured Guglielmo Vicario
